creator: bortzy@riseup.net
text:
Created attachment 203737
core file from the crash limited to 18Mb

Using lxterminal as a console frequently, I noticed that, sometimes, pasting a text generates a crash with a coredump.

This issue exists with FreeBSD 11 and FreeBSD 12.

FreeBSD version: 12.0-RELEASE-p3
lxterminal: 0.3.2
